calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Set For Trial On Jun-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Bitner in Pro Per; Telephone 415-378-6701, appearing on his own behalf
No other appearance.

Matter is heard. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A), N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted is DENIED without prejudice. Defendant has served his responses and the motion is moot. Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen will prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
